'''鈭歨-t-j''' ('''hataja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woop|woop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woop|woop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-t-j
|-
! Lemma
| hataja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hatajithi|hatajithi]] || [[word:hatajiji|hatajiji]] || [[word:hatajishi|hatajishi]] || [[word:hataji|hataji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hatajuthuth|hatajuthuth]] || [[word:hatajujuj|hatajujuj]] || [[word:hatajushush|hatajushush]] || [[word:hataj|hataj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hatajuthu|hatajuthu]] || [[word:hatajuju|hatajuju]] || [[word:hatajushu|hatajushu]] || [[word:hataju|hataju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hatajufuth|hatajufuth]] || [[word:hatajufuj|hatajufuj]] || [[word:hatajufush|hatajufush]] || [[word:hatajuf|hatajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hatajethe|hatajethe]] || [[word:hatajeje|hatajeje]] || [[word:hatajeshe|hatajeshe]] || [[word:hataje|hataje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hatajothoth|hatajothoth]] || [[word:hatajojoj|hatajojoj]] || [[word:hatajoshosh|hatajoshosh]] || [[word:hataj|hataj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hatajotho|hatajotho]] || [[word:hatajojo|hatajojo]] || [[word:hatajosho|hatajosho]] || [[word:hatajo|hatajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hatajofoth|hatajofoth]] || [[word:hatajofoj|hatajofoj]] || [[word:hatajofosh|hatajofosh]] || [[word:hatajof|hatajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hataj忙th忙|hataj忙th忙]] || [[word:hataj忙j忙|hataj忙j忙]] || [[word:hataj忙sh忙|hataj忙sh忙]] || [[word:hataj忙|hataj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hatajathath|hatajathath]] || [[word:hatajajaj|hatajajaj]] || [[word:hatajashash|hatajashash]] || [[word:hataj|hataj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hatajatha|hatajatha]] || [[word:hatajaja|hatajaja]] || [[word:hatajasha|hatajasha]] || [[word:hataja|hataja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hatajafath|hatajafath]] || [[word:hatajafaj|hatajafaj]] || [[word:hatajafash|hatajafash]] || [[word:hatajaf|hatajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hatajasha|hatajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohatajasha|gohatajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihatajasha|gokihatajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hatajn眉sha|hatajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohatajnkn眉sha|gohatajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihatajn眉sha|gokihatajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hatajsh毛sha|hatajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohatajnksh毛sha|gohatajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihatajsh毛sha|gokihatajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hatajrosha|hatajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohatajnkrosha|gohatajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihatajrosha|gokihatajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hatajmusha|hatajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohatajnkmusha|gohatajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihatajmusha|gokihatajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hatajsherasha|hatajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohatajnksherasha|gohatajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihatajsherasha|gokihatajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hatajngasha|hatajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohatajnkngasha|gohatajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihatajngasha|gokihatajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hatajyasha|hatajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohatajnkyasha|gohatajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihatajyasha|gokihatajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hatajyamasha|hatajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohatajnkyamasha|gohatajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihatajyamasha|gokihatajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hatajn眉sh毛sha|hatajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohatajnkn眉sh毛sha|gohatajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihatajn眉sh毛sha|gokihatajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hatajn眉rosha|hatajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohatajnkn眉rosha|gohatajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihatajn眉rosha|gokihatajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hatajn眉musha|hatajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohatajnkn眉musha|gohatajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihatajn眉musha|gokihatajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hatajsh毛n眉sha|hatajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohatajnksh毛n眉sha|gohatajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihatajsh毛n眉sha|gokihatajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hatajsh毛rosha|hatajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohatajnksh毛rosha|gohatajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihatajsh毛rosha|gokihatajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hatajsh毛musha|hatajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohatajnksh毛musha|gohatajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihatajsh毛musha|gokihatajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hatajron眉sha|hatajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohatajnkron眉sha|gohatajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihatajron眉sha|gokihatajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hatajrosh毛sha|hatajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohatajnkrosh毛sha|gohatajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihatajrosh毛sha|gokihatajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hatajromusha|hatajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohatajnkromusha|gohatajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihatajromusha|gokihatajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hatajmun眉sha|hatajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohatajnkmun眉sha|gohatajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihatajmun眉sha|gokihatajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hatajmush毛sha|hatajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohatajnkmush毛sha|gohatajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihatajmush毛sha|gokihatajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hatajmurosha|hatajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohatajnkmurosha|gohatajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihatajmurosha|gokihatajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hataj|hataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:h忙t忙j|h忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohataj|hohataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoh忙t忙j|hoh忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohataj|hohohataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoh忙t忙j|hohoh忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉hataj|n眉hataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉h忙t忙j|n眉h忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉hataj|n眉n眉hataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉h忙t忙j|n眉n眉h忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂hataj|n茂hataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂h忙t忙j|n茂h忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂hataj|n茂n茂hataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂h忙t忙j|n茂n茂h忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhataj|luhataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luh忙t忙j|luh忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhataj|luluhataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluh忙t忙j|luluh忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihataj|lihataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lih忙t忙j|lih忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihataj|lilihataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilih忙t忙j|lilih忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohataj|kohataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koh忙t忙j|koh忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohataj|kokohataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoh忙t忙j|kokoh忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehataj|kehataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keh忙t忙j|keh忙t忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehataj|kekehataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeh忙t忙j|kekeh忙t忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
